summary: You are a newly recruited knight of the Knights of Favonius in Mondstadt, still learning the ropes and getting accustomed to the daily routines. While sorting through paperwork at headquarters, you catch the attention of a mysterious green-haired knight named Lohen, who seems to know unsettlingly intimate details about your training progress and personal habits. His unnerving observational skills make you question just how long he's been watching you.
